items.title: Secular Brightness Trends of Starlink and OneWeb Satellites
items.summary: arXiv:2604.13145v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnitudes recorded from 2021 through 2026 for Starlink VisorSats reveal brightening of 0.6 magnitudes, while those of OneWeb show dimming of 0.4. Both trends are significant at 3 sigma. This study is based on 1.6 million magnitudes…
